scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @legacy-nexus/contracts && npm run build --workspace @legacy-nexus/api && npm run build --workspace @legacy-nexus/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @legacy-nexus/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @legacy-nexus/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @legacy-nexus/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @legacy-nexus/contracts && npm run test --workspace @legacy-nexus/api && npm run test --workspace @legacy-nexus/web --if-present
